avatar_url.description: Public URL of employee profile photo (Supabase Storage)

business_type.description: Which business unit this employee belongs to

monthly_rate.description: Rate value for the pay period. Meaning depends on rate_basis: if 'total', this is the full period total (monthly/weekly/custom total); if 'daily', this is the daily rate and the period total is derived (daily * period days).

salary_type.description: commission = per work order; monthly = fixed calendar-month salary; weekly = fixed 7-day period, rolling from employment_start_date; custom = fixed period_days-length period, rolling from employment_start_date

rate_basis.description: total = monthly_rate holds the full period total; daily = monthly_rate holds a daily rate, period total is computed (daily * period days)

period_days.description: Length in days of the pay period, only used when salary_type='custom'

employment_start_date.description: Date salary cycle started/reset (YYYY-MM-DD). For weekly/custom salary types, pay periods roll forward in fixed-length blocks anchored to this date.
